nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mauduit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: Bridget
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Bridget de Mauduit was born about 1098, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, William de Mauduit II, was 8 and her mother, Maude Hanslape, was 21. She married Erasmus Seyton Sir Knight. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bridget de Mauduit est née environ 1098, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Mauduit II, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Maude Hanslape, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Erasmus Seyton Sir Knight. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bridget de Mauduit um 1098 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Mauduit II 8 und ihre Mutter Maude Hanslape 21. Sie hat Erasmus Seyton Sir Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget de Mauduit è nata il circa 1098 nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, William de Mauduit II, aveva 8 anni e sua madre, Maude Hanslape, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Erasmus Seyton Sir Knight. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bridget de Mauduitが約1098年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで生まれた時，父William de Mauduit IIは8歳，母Maude Hanslapeは21歳であった。Erasmus Seyton Sir Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Bridget de Mauduit(이)가 대략 1098년 영국 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Mauduit II(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Hanslape(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Erasmus Seyton Sir Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Seaton, Rutland, England: Seaton, Roteland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget de Mauduit nasceu aproximadamente 1098, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Mauduit II, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Maude Hanslape, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Erasmus Seyton Sir Knight. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bridget de Mauduit родилась около 1098 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Mauduit II было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Hanslape, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Erasmus Seyton Sir Knight. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bridget de Mauduit nació aproximadamente 1098, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Mauduit II, tenía 8 años y su mamá, Maude Hanslape, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Erasmus Seyton Sir Knight. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
